content:
@everyone 
An update on the status of the coordination repo:

I've just pushed a major commit that rewrites ALL the files in the repo with the current source files. If you're currently working on one of my files, **I suggest downloading the new one,** as the one you've been working with was using a potentially outdated version of the text. The new files also contain the TW column which if I'm not mistaken is Traditional Chinese?

Step 1 was conceptualizing and setting up the framework for that process to happen.
This was Step 2. There's a lot more for me to do to get the repo up to current;
Step 3 is to compile all of the pending volunteer translation content, write attributions to the ledgers, and send it upstream.
Step 4 is to update ALL of the Ledgers to add a TW header.
Step 5 is to add all of the new relevant keys to all the files (for example, adding Vortice and Xu to /Archives/Characters).
Step 6 is to add all the new files for new content (for example, adding the all the new side Stories to /Story/).

I also created a directory with individual files for each Module in the original source sheet. These are unmodified, unsorted, and will not be updated when repo files get compiled; they are simply there for volunteers to work on just one module at a time instead of loading the entire source sheet. 

My repo does have the ability to compile these files into the regular bulk commit I send upstream to BIAV; if you work on one of these files, feel free to post them in <#1446619934565204231> all the same.

These can be found in [/(Meta)/Split Source/](https://github.com/omnichromia/morimens-volunteer-coordination/tree/main/(Meta)/Split%20Source ).
The full original source sheet can be found at [/(Meta)/Official Source Sheet.xlsx](https://github.com/omnichromia/morimens-volunteer-coordination/blob/main/(Meta)/Official%20Source%20Sheet.xlsx ).
